English: Wash your hands regularly with soap and clean water.
Kiswahili: Nawa mikono yako mara kwa mara kwa sabuni na maji safi.

English: Visit the nearest health facility if you experience malaria symptoms.
Kiswahili: Tembelea kituo cha afya kilicho karibu ikiwa una dalili za malaria.

English: All learners should report to school on the official reopening date.
Kiswahili: Wanafunzi wote wanapaswa kuripoti shuleni katika tarehe rasmi ya kufunguliwa.

English: Parents are encouraged to ensure regular school attendance.
Kiswahili: Wazazi wanahimizwa kuhakikisha watoto wanahudhuria shule mara kwa mara.

English: Farmers are encouraged to use certified seeds during planting.
Kiswahili: Wakulima wanahimizwa kutumia mbegu zilizoidhinishwa wakati wa kupanda.

English: Vaccinate livestock regularly to prevent disease outbreaks.
Kiswahili: Chanja mifugo mara kwa mara ili kuzuia milipuko ya magonjwa.

English: Always wear your seatbelt while travelling.
Kiswahili: Vaa mkanda wa usalama kila unapokuwa safarini.

English: Report suspicious activities to the nearest police station.
Kiswahili: Ripoti shughuli zinazotiliwa shaka katika kituo cha polisi kilicho karibu.

English: Verify your voter registration details before the deadline.
Kiswahili: Thibitisha taarifa zako za usajili wa mpiga kura kabla ya tarehe ya mwisho.

English: Access government services through the eCitizen platform.
Kiswahili: Pata huduma za serikali kupitia jukwaa la eCitizen.
